description_long: This is a brightly colored arcade game cabinet with a predominantly pink and pastel color scheme, featuring playful and cartoonish artwork. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen area, a control panel with visible buttons, and a coin slot section below. The side panels are decorated with bold, comic-style graphics of a muscular cartoon character and the text 'BUFF TUFF' in large, stylized letters, set against a background of lightning bolts and clouds. The top of the cabinet has a marquee area with matching artwork and the game's title. The back of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation slots and access panels. The overall design is eye-catching and themed for a fun, energetic arcade environment.
description: A pink arcade game cabinet with cartoon muscleman artwork, a large screen, and bold 'BUFF TUFF' graphics on the sides and marquee.
description_view_0: Front view shows the screen, control panel with buttons, coin slot, and the marquee with 'BUFF TUFF' and cartoon faces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'BUFF TUFF' logo and a muscular cartoon character standing on a platform with a yellow lightning background.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain black panel with ventilation slots and no decorative artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view features another 'BUFF TUFF' logo and a similar muscular cartoon character holding a large object, set against a pink and orange background.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a joystick and several round buttons, arranged in a typical arcade pattern, with a pink and blue color scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'BUFF TUFF' title in bold yellow and pink letters, cartoon faces, and a pastel background with stars and lightning motifs
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful cartoon artwork of a muscular character, the 'BUFF TUFF' logo, and dynamic backgrounds with lightning and clouds in pastel tones
